title: Missing HowTo schema on instructional content
updated_guidance: Google completely deprecated HowTo rich results. They were removed from desktop in September 2023 and fully phased out on mobile by 2024. Google dropped the HowTo search appearance, rich result report, and Rich Results Test support.

title: Site uses client-side rendering without a server-side fallback
updated_guidance: Google deprecated dynamic rendering as a recommended workaround. The documentation was updated to clarify that dynamic rendering is error-prone and adds server complexity. Google recommends SSR, SSG, or hydration instead.

title: Book actions structured data is not implemented for book listings
updated_guidance: Google announced it is phasing out the Book Actions rich result. The Google Search Central page still notes the feature is limited to book providers with a wide selection, but the June 2025 blog post confirms the phase-out.

title: Book actions data feed has errors or missing required properties
updated_guidance: Google announced it is phasing out the Book Actions rich result. Feed validation errors are moot since the rich result itself is being retired.

title: Course list structured data is not implemented for educational content
updated_guidance: Google announced that Course Info rich results are being phased out.

title: Course schema has validation errors or missing required properties
updated_guidance: Google announced that Course Info rich results are being phased out. Fixing validation errors provides no benefit since the rich result is being retired.

title: Education Q&A structured data is not implemented on flashcard pages
updated_guidance: Google announced that Practice Problem (Quiz) structured data support is being phased out.

title: Education Q&A schema has validation errors or missing required properties
updated_guidance: Google announced that Practice Problem (Quiz) structured data support is being phased out. Fixing validation errors provides no benefit since the rich result is being retired.

title: Fact check structured data is not implemented on fact-checking content
updated_guidance: Google announced that Claim Review (Fact Check) rich results are being phased out. Additionally, Poynter reported that Google has been downgrading fact-checking content and rich results, though Google has not confirmed this.

title: Fact check schema has validation errors or missing required properties
updated_guidance: Google announced that Claim Review (Fact Check) rich results are being phased out. Fixing validation errors provides no benefit since the rich result is being retired.

title: FAQ structured data is not implemented on eligible pages
updated_guidance: Google restricted FAQ rich results to well-known authoritative government and health websites only. Previously any site with valid FAQPage markup could earn FAQ rich results.

title: FAQ schema has validation errors or missing required properties
updated_guidance: Google restricted FAQ rich results to well-known authoritative government and health websites only. For non-eligible sites fixing validation errors provides no benefit.

title: Speakable structured data is not implemented on news content
updated_guidance: Speakable markup is now a legacy signal. Voice responses are primarily generated by AI instead of pulled from structured speakable blocks. The feature remains in beta and is limited to US-based English Google Home devices.

title: Speakable-marked content is not optimized for voice delivery
updated_guidance: Speakable markup is now a legacy signal. Optimizing speakable content provides minimal benefit since AI-generated voice responses have largely replaced the structured speakable block approach.
